title: Entry Write Control System (MICU) Input Inspection

crossRefs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

blocks.text: Entry Write Control System (MICU) Input Inspection

1. Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box 2. Perform input checks and if all is normal and there is an abnormality in the system Replace the fuse box Each coupler is all female terminal cord side *1: Vehicles equipped with TRW SRS unit *2: Vehicles equipped with DENSO SRS unit inspection terminal Wiring color Measuring conditions result Inspection items in case of abnormality P1 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. B8 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. T27 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. U17 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. X1 yellow 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground. Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition H4 red Driver Open the door Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. H2 *1 T24 *2 purple Assistant Open the door Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. H3 *1 H2 *2 purple *1 peach *2 R. Open rear door Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. H11 *2 purple Open the tailgate. Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. H11 *1 H3 *2 purple *1 white *2 L. Open rear door Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. F7 purple Driver Door Lock Knob UNLOCK Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. F11 white Driver Door Lock Knob LOCK *1: Vehicles equipped with TRW SRS unit *2: Vehicles equipped with DENSO SRS unit 3. Reconnect each coupler in the fuse box 4. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace the fuse box K2 ash Map light DOOR position, shorting the inspection terminal to body ground. Map Lights must be on. Cargo area Light DOOR position, shorting inspection terminals to body ground. Cargo area light must be on
